# Uragaki UI

> Hand-drawn, sketchy UI component library built on shadcn/ui + rough.js for React.
> Paper-prototyping aesthetic for wireframes, MVP demos, and creative interfaces.

## Install

```bash
npm install uragaki-ui
```

## Setup

```tsx
// Import styles (required)
import "uragaki-ui/styles.css";

// Wrap app with ThemeProvider for dark/light mode
import { ThemeProvider } from "uragaki-ui";

function App() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider defaultTheme="system">
      {/* your app */}
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```

## Peer Dependencies

- react >= 18
- react-dom >= 18
- tailwindcss >= 4

## Architecture

Each Uragaki component wraps a shadcn/ui (Radix UI) component with a rough.js SVG overlay to create hand-drawn borders. The SVG overlay uses `pointer-events: none` so interactivity is fully preserved. All components support dark mode via ThemeProvider.

Common props across most components:
- `roughness?: number` (default: 2.6) - How rough/sketchy the borders look
- `seed?: number` - Fixed seed for consistent rendering (prevents flicker)
- All standard HTML/React props from the underlying component

## Components

### Layout
- UragakiCard (+ CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter, CardAction)
- UragakiAccordion (+ AccordionItem, AccordionTrigger, AccordionContent)
- UragakiTabs (+ TabsList, TabsTrigger, TabsContent)
- UragakiCollapsible (+ CollapsibleTrigger, CollapsibleContent)
- UragakiResizablePanelGroup (+ ResizablePanel, ResizableHandle)
- UragakiScrollArea (+ ScrollBar)
- UragakiAspectRatio
- UragakiSeparator
- UragakiSkeleton
- UragakiTable (+ TableHeader, TableBody, TableFooter, TableHead, TableRow, TableCell, TableCaption)

### Input
- UragakiButton - variant: "default" | "destructive" | "outline" | "secondary" | "ghost" | "link"
- UragakiInput - borderStyle: "underline" | "box"
- UragakiTextarea
- UragakiCheckbox
- UragakiRadioGroup (+ RadioGroupItem)
- UragakiSelect (+ SelectTrigger, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectValue, SelectGroup, SelectLabel)
- UragakiSlider
- UragakiSwitch
- UragakiToggle
- UragakiToggleGroup (+ ToggleGroupItem)
- UragakiCalendar
- UragakiInputOTP (+ InputOTPGroup, InputOTPSlot, InputOTPSeparator)
- UragakiForm (+ FormField, FormItem, FormLabel, FormControl, FormDescription, FormMessage)
- UragakiLabel

### Overlay
- UragakiDialog (+ DialogTrigger, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogFooter, DialogTitle, DialogDescription)
- UragakiAlertDialog (+ AlertDialogTrigger, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogTitle, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogAction, AlertDialogCancel)
- UragakiSheet (+ SheetTrigger, SheetContent, SheetHeader, SheetFooter, SheetTitle, SheetDescription, SheetClose)
- UragakiDrawer (+ DrawerTrigger, DrawerClose, DrawerContent, DrawerHeader, DrawerFooter, DrawerTitle, DrawerDescription)
- UragakiPopover (+ PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent)
- UragakiHoverCard (+ HoverCardTrigger, HoverCardContent)
- UragakiTooltip (+ TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger, TooltipContent)
- UragakiContextMenu (+ ContextMenuTrigger, ContextMenuContent, ContextMenuGroup, ContextMenuItem, ContextMenuLabel, ContextMenuSeparator, ContextMenuShortcut, ContextMenuCheckboxItem, ContextMenuRadioGroup, ContextMenuRadioItem, ContextMenuSub, ContextMenuSubTrigger, ContextMenuSubContent)

### Display
- UragakiBadge - variant: "default" | "destructive" | "secondary" | "outline"
- UragakiAlert (+ AlertTitle, AlertDescription) - variant: "default" | "destructive"
- UragakiAvatar (+ AvatarImage, AvatarFallback)
- UragakiProgress
- UragakiSonner (toast notifications)

### Navigation
- UragakiBreadcrumb (+ BreadcrumbList, BreadcrumbItem, BreadcrumbLink, BreadcrumbPage, BreadcrumbSeparator, BreadcrumbEllipsis)
- UragakiDropdownMenu (+ DropdownMenuTrigger, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuLabel, DropdownMenuSeparator, DropdownMenuShortcut, DropdownMenuCheckboxItem, DropdownMenuRadioGroup, DropdownMenuRadioItem, DropdownMenuSub, DropdownMenuSubTrigger, DropdownMenuSubContent)
- UragakiMenubar (+ MenubarMenu, MenubarTrigger, MenubarContent, MenubarItem, MenubarSeparator, MenubarLabel, MenubarCheckboxItem, MenubarRadioGroup, MenubarRadioItem, MenubarGroup, MenubarSub, MenubarSubContent, MenubarSubTrigger, MenubarShortcut)
- UragakiNavigationMenu (+ NavigationMenuList, NavigationMenuItem, NavigationMenuContent, NavigationMenuTrigger, NavigationMenuLink, NavigationMenuIndicator, NavigationMenuViewport)
- UragakiPagination (+ PaginationContent, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationPrevious, PaginationNext, PaginationEllipsis)
- UragakiSidebar (+ SidebarProvider, SidebarHeader, SidebarContent, SidebarFooter, SidebarGroup, SidebarGroupLabel, SidebarGroupAction, SidebarGroupContent, SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuItem, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarMenuAction, SidebarMenuBadge, SidebarMenuSkeleton, SidebarMenuSub, SidebarMenuSubItem, SidebarMenuSubButton, SidebarInput, SidebarInset, SidebarRail, SidebarSeparator, SidebarTrigger)
- UragakiCommand (+ CommandDialog, CommandInput, CommandList, CommandEmpty, CommandGroup, CommandItem, CommandShortcut, CommandSeparator)
- UragakiCarousel (+ CarouselContent, CarouselItem, CarouselPrevious, CarouselNext)

### Data Visualization
- UragakiChartContainer (+ ChartTooltip, ChartTooltipContent, ChartLegend, ChartLegendContent, ChartStyle)

### Utilities
- ThemeProvider - Dark/light mode management
- useTheme - Access current theme
- UragakiBorder - Core rough.js border wrapper (shape: "rectangle" | "ellipse")

## Quick Examples

### Button
```tsx
import { UragakiButton } from "uragaki-ui";
<UragakiButton variant="default">Click me</UragakiButton>
<UragakiButton variant="outline">Outline</UragakiButton>
<UragakiButton variant="destructive">Delete</UragakiButton>
```

### Card with Form
```tsx
import { UragakiCard, UragakiCardHeader, UragakiCardTitle, UragakiCardContent, UragakiCardFooter, UragakiInput, UragakiButton } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiCard>
  <UragakiCardHeader>
    <UragakiCardTitle>Sign Up</UragakiCardTitle>
  </UragakiCardHeader>
  <UragakiCardContent className="space-y-4">
    <UragakiInput placeholder="Email" borderStyle="underline" />
    <UragakiInput placeholder="Password" type="password" borderStyle="underline" />
  </UragakiCardContent>
  <UragakiCardFooter>
    <UragakiButton>Submit</UragakiButton>
  </UragakiCardFooter>
</UragakiCard>
```

### Dialog
```tsx
import { UragakiDialog, UragakiDialogTrigger, UragakiDialogContent, UragakiDialogHeader, UragakiDialogTitle, UragakiDialogDescription, UragakiButton } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiDialog>
  <UragakiDialogTrigger asChild>
    <UragakiButton>Open Dialog</UragakiButton>
  </UragakiDialogTrigger>
  <UragakiDialogContent>
    <UragakiDialogHeader>
      <UragakiDialogTitle>Title</UragakiDialogTitle>
      <UragakiDialogDescription>Description here</UragakiDialogDescription>
    </UragakiDialogHeader>
  </UragakiDialogContent>
</UragakiDialog>
```

### Tabs
```tsx
import { UragakiTabs, UragakiTabsList, UragakiTabsTrigger, UragakiTabsContent } from "uragaki-ui";

<UragakiTabs defaultValue="tab1">
  <UragakiTabsList>
    <UragakiTabsTrigger value="tab1">Tab 1</UragakiTabsTrigger>
    <UragakiTabsTrigger value="tab2">Tab 2</UragakiTabsTrigger>
  </UragakiTabsList>
  <UragakiTabsContent value="tab1">Content 1</UragakiTabsContent>
  <UragakiTabsContent value="tab2">Content 2</UragakiTabsContent>
</UragakiTabs>
```

## Detailed Docs

- Full API reference: llms-full.txt
